bug_fix_report.reproduction: After a cache cleanup, Tenant A warms the reassignment-policy cache for project-42, then Tenant B requests the policy for the same project; test_reassignment_is_tenant_isolated deterministically fails because Tenant B receives Tenant A's policy instead of its own.
bug_fix_report.root_cause: The reassignment-policy cache key contains only the project id and omits tenant identity, causing Tenant A and Tenant B to share reassignment-policy:project-42.
confirming_evidence: Logging only the computed cache key showed both tenant requests using reassignment-policy:project-42, and source inspection confirmed that the key contains only the project id.

Including tenant id in the cache key made the original cross-tenant reproduction pass for 50 consecutive paired requests, while removing only that change restored the failure on the first paired request.
The authorization guard trace showed that the guard ran and correctly authorized Tenant B, rejecting authorization bypass as the cause.
bug_fix_report.fix_boundary: Include tenant id in the reassignment-policy cache key and leave authorization code unchanged.
bug_fix_report.regression_protection: Retain test_reassignment_is_tenant_isolated; the verified fix also passed 50 consecutive paired requests and the surrounding policy tests.

debug_journal.hypothesis: The authorization guard was bypassed because the cleanup moved it.
debug_journal.prediction: The guard trace will be absent for Tenant B.
debug_journal.experiment: Add a trace at guard entry without changing code behavior.
debug_journal.result: The guard ran and authorized Tenant B correctly; the hypothesis was rejected and no authorization patch was applied.

debug_journal.hypothesis: The cache key omits tenant identity.
debug_journal.prediction: The same cache entry id will appear for Tenant A and Tenant B.
debug_journal.experiment: Log the computed cache key only.
debug_journal.result: Both requests used reassignment-policy:project-42, and source inspection confirmed that the key contains project id only.
